query: SELECT id, claim_number, incident_description, incident_type FROM claims WHERE claim_number LIKE '%2640001%' OR id BETWEEN 2640000 AND 2640002 LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute SELECT id, claim_number, incident_description, incident_type FROM claims WHERE claim_number LIKE '%2640001%' OR id BETWEEN 2640000 AND 2640002 LIMIT 5;
